svg.text: From first scan to higher rankings — automated, transparent, proven.
We push the approved fix directly to your CMS.
No dev work. No logins. Live within seconds.
Every change is logged and reversible.
Supports: WordPress · Shopify · Webflow · GitHub (via PR)
For complex issues, one click sends a request
to our team. We verify, fix, and confirm with
you when it's live. No guesswork, no waiting.
You'll be notified when the fix is live and verified.
Every fix is tracked in your change history. Re-scan any time to find
new opportunities. Your site continuously improves — automatically.
